title: 2026 Oscars Best Actress Predictions
text: Yahoo's 2026 Oscars Best Actress predictions feature five contenders: Jessie Buckley in Hamnet, Rose Byrne in If I Had Legs I'd Kick You, Kate Hudson in Song Sung Blue, Renate Reinsve in Sentimental Value, and Emma Stone in Bugonia. Jessie Buckley is overwhelmingly favored to claim the award, with Gold Derby giving the 36-year-old Irish actress a 100% chance of winning best actress, marking her first Academy Award win. The Yahoo team's choice differs from the frontrunner, advocating for Rose Byrne and emphasizing her compelling performance. The staff notes an unusual storyline involving Byrne's partner Bobby Cannavale, who missed her Golden Globes acceptance speech while adopting a reptile at a New Jersey expo. An Oscar victory for Byrne would provide dramatic narrative closure to this memorable award season subplot. This marks Hudson's second nomination and first since 2001, while a Byrne win would join her mother Goldie Hawn as an Oscar-winning family member.
